Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Kevin Boone: The "small web" is bigger than you might think 32 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Human Organ Atlas 30 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Canada's bill C-22 mandates mass metadata surveillance 949 upvotes, 301 comments
  4. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant 172 upvotes, 49 comments
  5. Speed at the cost of quality: Study of use of Cursor AI in open source projects 23 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. MoD sources warn Palantir role at heart of government is threat to UK security 439 upvotes, 155 comments
  7. I Love FreeBSD 193 upvotes, 67 comments
  8. Chrome DevTools MCP (2025) 561 upvotes, 220 comments
  9. Stop Sloppypasta 577 upvotes, 227 comments
  10. The 49MB web page 752 upvotes, 327 comments
  11. Six ingenious ways how Canon DSLRs used to illuminate their autofocus points 115 upvotes, 40 comments
  12. Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg 81 upvotes, 27 comments
  13. Comparing Python Type Checkers: Typing Spec Conformance 60 upvotes, 19 comments
  14. Corruption erodes social trust more in democracies than in autocracies 534 upvotes, 246 comments
  15. Home Assistant waters my plants 191 upvotes, 83 comments
  16. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 869 upvotes, 536 comments
  17. 'Pokémon Go' players unknowingly trained delivery robots with 30B images 117 upvotes, 62 comments
  18. Event Publisher enables event integration between Keycloak and OpenFGA 15 upvotes, 4 comments
  19. Even Faster Asin() Was Staring Right at Me 68 upvotes, 35 comments
  20. Launch HN: Voygr (YC W26) – A better maps API for agents and AI apps 29 upvotes, 14 comments
  21. Launch HN: Chamber (YC W26) – An AI Teammate for GPU Infrastructure 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  22. On The Need For Understanding 10 upvotes, 3 comments
  23. How I write software with LLMs 423 upvotes, 403 comments
  24. US Job Market Visualizer 208 upvotes, 187 comments
  25. Show HN: Hackerbrief – Top posts on Hacker News summarized daily 53 upvotes, 39 comments
  26. Cert Authorities Check for DNSSEC from Today 39 upvotes, 31 comments
  27. MM120, a pharmaceutical form of LSD, shown to reduce anxiety symptoms (2025) 55 upvotes, 53 comments
  28. Apideck CLI – An AI-agent interface with much lower context consumption than MCP 59 upvotes, 64 comments
  29. AirPods Max 2 53 upvotes, 83 comments
  30. Kaizen (YC P25) Hiring Eng, GTM, Cos to Automate BPOs 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 2:00am, 17 March 2026. Source here.
